_comment: Integra VIAFLO 96 control link found with `plr-re viaflo discover`. The pipette connects over USB Type A-to-B (directly, or via the programming stand / communication module). transport is 'serial' for a USB-serial / virtual-COM link (the strong prior; endpoint 'path@baud'), or 'usb' for a raw USB device once a pyusb byte connection is added. The baud rate is a bench unknown until confirmed. Set the installed pipetting head's max volume with --max-volume (e.g. 12.5, 125, 300, or 1250 uL heads). Pass with `plr-re viaflo status --config configs/viaflo96.example.json`.
